cells.rationale: Early-proof-point task introducing a new freshness presentation axis inherited by all live panes with subtle correctness invariants (divergence gating against idle-pane false positives, suspend/resume clock-jump avoidance, preserving byte-identical suppression) plus a live design decision on which rev source ships with an ADR-truing fallback — a concrete intelligence-bound reason gating opus at the contract-shaped xhigh band.
